proof: function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T0, x1: T0) { x0(x1) <= x1 = is_pre_fixed_point[T0](x0, x1) }[P](f, x)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> T0, x1: T0) { is_fixed_point[T0](x0, x1) = (x0(x1) = x1) }[P](f, x)

function[T0](x0: T0 -> T0, x1: T0) { (not is_fixed_point[T0](x0, x1) or x0(x0(x1)) = x1) = fixed_point_iterate[T0](x0, x1) }[T](f, x)

function[T0, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x1: (T0, T1) -> Bool) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T1) { not x0(x2, x3) or x1(x2, x3) } = lib(relation_basic).relation_subset[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[T -> T, T](is_fixed_point[T], fixed_point_iterate[T])

function[T0, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x1: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x2: T0, x3: T1) { not lib(relation_basic).relation_subset[T0, T1](x0, x1) or not x0(x2, x3) or x1(x2, x3) }[T -> T, T](is_fixed_point[T], fixed_point_iterate[T], f, x)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> T0, x1: T0) { not (is_fixed_point[T0](x0, x1) and x0(x0(x1)) != x1) or not fixed_point_iterate[T0](x0, x1) }[T](f, x)

function[T0, T1](x0: (T0, T1) -> Bool, x1: (T0, T1) -> Bool) { not forall(x2: T0, x3: T1) { not x0(x2, x3) or x1(x2, x3) } or lib(relation_basic).relation_subset[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[T -> T, T](is_fixed_point[T], fixed_point_iterate[T])

not lib(relation_basic).relation_subset[T -> T, T](is_fixed_point[T], fixed_point_iterate[T])
let w0: T -> T satisfy { exists(k0: T) { is_fixed_point(w0, k0) and not fixed_point_iterate(w0, k0) } }
let w1: T satisfy { is_fixed_point(w0, w1) and not fixed_point_iterate(w0, w1) }
let w2: T satisfy { is_fixed_point(w0, w2) and not fixed_point_iterate(w0, w2) }
function[T0](x0: T0 -> T0, x1: T0) { (not is_fixed_point[T0](x0, x1) or x0(x0(x1)) = x1) = fixed_point_iterate[T0](x0, x1) }[T](w0, w2)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> T0, x1: T0) { is_fixed_point[T0](x0, x1) = (x0(x1) = x1) }[T](w0, w2)
